creator: gpalmer@FreeBSD.org
text:
I think there is another bug with popclient and handling largish
(well, more than 10 or so messages) mailboxes. It came back with `bad
file descriptor' after 7 or so messages in recent testing locally
(against the qpopper in ports). I haven't had time to get into it with
gdb and find the problem yet.

Gary
--
Gary Palmer                                          FreeBSD Core Team Member
FreeBSD: Turning PC's into workstations. See http://www.FreeBSD.ORG/ for info
